vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a meticulous audit of the provided image stack. My first step was to establish a baseline against the provided registry, followed by a pixel-by-pixel inspection of the soil surfaces in each pot. I validate that the registry is entirely inconsistent with the physical reality of the images. The pots are currently empty of any botanical life. The 'white rabbit' anchor is present, but the Pothos it is meant to accompany is absent. The environment appears to be a dormant or failed experimental setup.
